nasb.text: For I will die in this land, I shall not cross the Jordan, but you shall cross and take possession of this good land.

esv.text: For I must die in this land; I must not go over the Jordan. But you shall go over and take possession of that good land.

cnv.text: 我只有死在此地，不得過約旦河；你們卻可以過去，取得那美地作產業。

ccb.text: 我将死在约旦河这边，过不了约旦河。但你们必过去得到那片佳美之地。
